case_title: DAVID, ESTELA ANDOYAN VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DAVID, ESTELA ANDOYAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC UTILITIES SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPARTMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC UTILITIES SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPARTMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVID, ESTELA ANDOYAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC UTILITIES SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPARTMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-22-1994, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-09-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 01
CONTINUANCE REQUEST SENT TO THE JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE REQUESTED BY DEFT. COURT DATE RESERVE FOR 9/9/94 8:00 AM.
